title: Acianthera gouveiae
intro: Acianthera gouveiae, also known as Gouveia's Acianthera, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Acianthera gouveiae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Acianthera gouveiae is often prepared in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
